hero_subtitle: Corporate days, festivals, film sets, photoshoots and private celebrations. Wherever you need feeding, we bring the kitchen to you.
occasions_intro: We cook for boardrooms and festival fields, film crews at 5am and families on a Sunday. The food changes to suit the room — the standard doesn't. Whatever the setting, we bring a full kitchen, a calm team and food people actually talk about afterwards.

occasions.title: Corporate Events
occasions.description: Board lunches, away days, client entertaining, staff parties and office celebrations. Food that respects a schedule and still gives people something to talk about — served quietly, cleared quickly, back to work on time.

occasions.title: Festivals & Large Events
occasions.description: Feeding hundreds in a field is its own discipline. We arrive self-sufficient — our own power, water and prep — and keep the queue moving without dropping the quality that got us booked.

occasions.title: Film Sets & Photoshoots
occasions.description: Unit catering that understands a call sheet. Hot food at 5am, a running table through the day, and the flexibility to move when the schedule does — because it always does.

occasions.title: Private Celebrations
occasions.description: Birthdays, anniversaries, christenings, milestone dinners and family gatherings at home. The same kitchen and the same care, scaled to a garden or a dining room rather than a marquee.

cta_subtitle: Corporate, festival, location or private — tell us the details and we will build a menu around it.
